title: astragalus elatior
intro: Astragalus elatior, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of plant belonging to the legume family, characterized by its unique flower clusters and seed pods. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Astragalus elatior is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which enable the body to resist stress and maintain overall well-being. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced inflammation. Astragalus elatior can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, making it accessible for individuals seeking to incorporate its medicinal properties into their health regimen.
